overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a medieval castle common room with an ornate stone fireplace. A translucent ghostly figure periodically fades in and out on the left side while flames burn steadily in the hearth, casting warm light on the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint focused on the fireplace and the apparition to the left

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure cyclically fading in and out, shifting slightly from side to side

entered.detail: large gothic stone fireplace with carved archway and columns
active flames burning within the fireplace casting warm orange light
black iron pot suspended over the fire by a hook
curved stone steps leading up to the fireplace opening
arched wooden doorway leading to another room
tall potted plant visible through the archway
circular woven rug on the stone floor
decorative carved stone details on the right wall panel

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic castle common room centered on an ornate stone fireplace with burning flames. To the left, a translucent ghostly figure fades in and out in a continuous cycle near a wooden archway. The warm firelight illuminates the carved stone architecture, hanging iron cauldron, and woven rug on the floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a gothic castle common room where a ghostly presence intermittently disrupts the stillness. It begins with a focused view of an ornate stone fireplace, where burning flames cast a warm, flickering glow across the carved architecture and a woven rug. As the firelight illuminates a hanging iron cauldron, a translucent ghostly figure begins to fade in and out in a continuous cycle near a wooden archway to the left. The scene remains anchored on this interplay of light and shadow, finally settling into a rhythmic loop of the spirit appearing and vanishing against the steady warmth of the hearth.
